2023-24 Loyola Marymount Lions Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 12-19 (5-11, 6th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Stan Johnson

PS/G: 72.4 (214th of 362)

PA/G: 71.4 (160th of 362)

SRS: -0.06 (153rd of 362)

SOS: 0.31 (139th of 362)

ORtg: 109.0 (126th of 362)

DRtg: 107.6 (280th of 362)
